rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF MAYLENE CHAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #4, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/7/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Proof of payment of the assessment fee must be filed before an accounting can be approved. (2) Item 4b of the proof of service of notice is incomplete. (3) As of January 2008, the Judicial Council form Summary of Account must be used for all conservatorship accounts. [Prob. C. Sect. 2620(a) and CRC 7.575.] (4) There is no liabilities schedule reflecting the $25,000 advance from KHC Investment Company that might be reimbursable to the family partnership. (5) Whether or not the Judicial Council forms are used by a standard account filer, the account must also state the date of any order authorizing payment of fiduciary or attorney fees. [CRC 7.575(e)(6)(C).] See Judicial Council forms GC-400(PH)(1) and GC-400(C)(4). (6) The probate referee's commission for the reappraisal for sale filed on 3/1/23 was $975.00. The disbursements schedule shows that he was paid $995.00. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 6/23/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE AVINOAM MANDELBROT FAMILY TRUST DATED JULY 19, 2005
rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustee David Mandelbrots Petition For Order: (1) To Require Former Trustee Tzipora Sobol To Reimburse The Trust For All Litigation Attorneys Fees And Costs; (2) Surcharge For Damages To The Trust; (3) Return Trust Property; (4) To Confirm Trustees Objections To Accountings; And (5) Confirming Defense Of The Purported Restatement Constitutes A Trust Contest
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, despite the following issues: 1) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) was not attached to the DE-120 form filed on 04/29/2025. 2) The box was checked at item 1 of the DE-120 form, even though this is a trust case. 3) The petition requests relief under Probate Code sections 850 and 859, but notice thereof was not given on the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-115. 4) Direct notice was not given to respondent. CRC 7.51(a)(2). 5) The proof of service did not list some specific beneficiaries (Synagogue, children of settlor's brother, settlor's friends, and settlor's cousin). If their interests have been fully satisfied, written receipts required by Probate Code section 1206(b) must be filed for the Court to dispense with notice. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WANDA MAY LOO
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/1/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No proof of service has been filed. Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) The report does not fully meet the requirements of LRSF 14.35 J. (4) Please file something to support the allegation in paragraph 3 of the petition (e.g., documentation from the NY court or the NY attorney confirming the estimated time to close the estate of David Loo, who died in 2017). Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 6/17/25. Continuances for procedural defects will not extend any additional time to administer the estate the Court might grant. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JONATHAN W. KUTCHINS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Decrease Conservatorship Bond
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/1/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Please file statements confirming that assets have been transferred into the trust. (Ordinarily, a fiduciary's bond is not decreased until an accounting is filed, which includes filing of financial institution statements.) (2) The informational I&A does not list certain tangible personal property with any specificity, as they were in the I&A filed in the conservatorship. (See items 8-15, 16-18, and 28-37 in the conservatorship I&A.) NB: The conservatorship or trust case number must be noted in parentheses under any pleading caption in the related matter. [LRSF 14.47 B.3.] Please provide courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 6/17/25. Lack of courtesy copies can delay review. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. (1) The Court is to decide whether further information is needed regarding the heirs at law, to review the sufficiency of notice, as some are unknown or have not been identified as deceased or having surviving children. (2) Additionally, the Court will determine whether the Gift Letter is enforceable as the second amendment to the Trust and may inquire further about its validity. (3) A new proposed order for the remaining relief to be submitted, as some relief was already granted. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANK S.Y. CHIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as nothing has been filed to address the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 01/28/2025): 1) A verified supplemental allegation must be made that a copy of the devisee trust was included in Attachment 4c. 2) No Attachment 7 was attached to the petition. Attachment 7 must include allegations required by LRSF 14.26(A) ("The petition must contain specific information regarding the manner and timing of acquisition of the property alleged to be community or quasi-community property. An allegation must also be made that none of the property was owned by the decedent before marriage or domestic partnership registration, acquired by gift or inheritance, or purchased with funds received by gift or inheritance. If any property is claimed to be community but was owned by the decedent prior to marriage or domestic partnership registration or acquired by gift, devise, descent, joint tenancy survivorship, or similar means, the petition must state with particularity the way in which the property was transmuted to community property"). 3) Item 7b of the petition was not checked, while item 1b was checked. 4) No Attachment 7b was attached to the petition. 5) A copy of the current vesting deed (or other recorded instrument or title report from which the Court can ascertain how the decedent held title at the time of his death) must be filed for the real property subject to this petition. See LRSF 14.26(A). 6) As the decedent left a pour-over will, his interest in the subject real property did not pass outright to petitioner individually as the surviving spouse. Property disposed of in trust under the decedent's will is subject to administration, even if the surviving spouse is the only trustee or beneficiary. See Probate Code section 13501(b). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF IHSAN BAKER DUJAILI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/8/25. Examiner's Notes emailed to petitioner with the following issues: 1) The Will is not self-proving (the witnesses did not sign under penalty of perjury under the laws of the State of California). Proof of Subscribing Witness will be needed. 2) The caption of the petition does not match the body of petition. Please clarify whether full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act is being requested. 3) None of the charitable beneficiaries were listed in Item 8 or given notice. 4) David Fielding, alternate executor, was not listed in Item 8 or given notice. 5) Nahiah Dujali was given notice at an address in Illinois, but the petition lists her address as being in Iraq. 6) The address and phone number of both proposed executors are needed on DE-147. If the information is the same for both individuals, that fact should be noted. Please re-file DE-147.
